reviews.review_title: Glitchiest Game My Daughter Has Used
reviews.review_description: She has fun with it still, kind of. But the amount of glitching in this game is actually insane. I watch her via stream and I’m in disbelief I paid $10 for something that glitches this bad.. paws stuck in drawers, falling through the floor, sounds playing 3 minutes after they happen… come on. Update it and fix it.

developer_response.body: Many of the issues you mentioned are ones we haven't encountered before. May I ask what device you're using and how these problems occurred? You can contact us on our Discord server to provide feedback, and we'll work on reproducing and fixing these issues.

reviews.review_description: I love this game BUT I would love to see new areas, maybe like a dog pound, thank you for telling me what to do with that voice barking and to be honest it is a really good addition now I know, if there isn't already (as I haven't finished much yet) add a multiplayer... also the paws are really clumsy so whenever I jump onto the drawers for example, my paws get stuck inside it and it takes a minute or two for the paws to come back up and the paws are really slow with walking too, by the way what do I bring the dog behind the fence as idk what to do, I bring a bone to him and he jumps over and attacks me so idk what to give him but I will probably find out later in the game, Thank You😊

I'm absolutely loving the exploration in Dog Plan! Seeing the world from a pup's perspective makes the environment feel massive and full of secrets. The scene design is so pleasing to the eye, and the interactive depth is incredible—it feels like every object was placed there for you to discover and play with.
I looks really fun

Right from the start, I was completely surprised by the unique perspective of the game. I originally thought Dog Plan would be about playing with dogs, but I never expected to actually live life as a dog. The game's physics feel really solid—the way movement and interaction are handled is both classic and immersive, making me truly feel like I am a little puppy exploring the world. It's a delightful and surprisingly authentic experience!

reviews.review_title: So much fun being a happy pup.
reviews.review_description:
Simply a blast! So much fun being a happy pup. 
This game is all about pure, unadulterated fun. The cartoon visuals are bright and cheerful, perfectly matching the overall happy vibe. It's incredibly satisfying to just run around, dig, and chew on anything you can get your virtual paws on. No pressure, just endless joyful mischief. Great game to put a smile on your face!

This game reminds me a bit of I Am a Cat, but it's not quite the same. It really makes me feel like I'm right in the middle of the animated movie Bolt. I'd love to see more content in future updates! Could I play as a dog agent, helping take down the enemy base? Devs, please keep the updates coming!

reviews.review_title: Seeing the world from a dog's perspecti
reviews.review_description: Overall, this is a very relaxing and promising game, perfect for those who want to experience what it's like to "be a dog."  Hopefully, future updates will add more gameplay and content, making it even more worthwhile to keep playing.  Additionally, it would be great if the movement and controls were smoother and faster.

Unlike 'I Am a Cat,' in the game you play as a dog, engaging in physical destruction (such as tearing pillows and smashing plates), using your dog nose to track scents to find treasures, interacting with your owner, and searching for hidden vinyl records to play music.

​The visuals are great, but the interactive mechanics are the real star of the show. The tutorial is super intuitive—perfect for VR beginners because you just "get it" immediately.
​The environmental design is so immersive, every little detail feels like it belongs there and is waiting to be explored. Also, the barking is absolute gold! It’s so funny and strangely satisfying to just bark at everyone in the courtroom or around the house. One of the most unique and fun sandboxes on the Meta store. Just get it!

reviews.review_title: Incredible depth and super satisfying in
reviews.review_description:
​I’m seriously impressed with the variety of equipment in this game—each gadget feels distinct in your hands, and the physical feedback is top-tier. The environmental design is also very well thought out; it feels like every corner of the map has something you can interact with.
​The tutorial is brilliant—it’s lightweight and lets you master all the mechanics while you're actually playing. Being a high-tech agent dog in this world is such a creative concept, and the multiplayer sync is rock solid. If you’re looking for a polished sandbox with tons of interactive props, you need to try this! ✨🐶

Upon starting the game, I found myself transformed into a cute dog. The fun lies in experiencing the daily life of this adorable canine. Additionally, there is a rich variety of action experiences, and the various activities are also very beneficial for exercise. It would be even better if the movement speed could be increased a little.

Seeing the world from a dog's height is such a cool VR experience. The immersion is great. It would be even better if the movement was a bit snappier; the paw traction feels a little loose/sliding. Can't wait for more tasks!

The cartoon visuals are spot on for this game; they keep the atmosphere light and fun even when you're tearing up the house. What truly shines is the interactive environment—the "see it, destroy it" mechanic is flawlessly executed. From digging holes in the garden to gnawing on chair legs, every action feels impactful and fun. A well-designed game!

reviews.review_title: I think the most interesting part of thi
reviews.review_description: I think the most interesting part of this game is that I can swing a pillow back and forth, and eventually break it. It feels really like being a dog to me, yes. It's a back-to-basics experience! And I can also play tricks on the trainer.
The art style is colorful and cute, which makes the destruction even funnier. It’s a great sandbox game to just mess around in. I can't wait to see what updates come next!

From the moment I started, the immersion was instant. Seeing the world from a dog's height, following intriguing scents, and just living the life of a curious pet is wonderfully charming. The game offers a rich variety of actions that go beyond simple destruction – I found myself nosing around for hidden vinyl records to have an impromptu drumming session, which was a delightful surprise. All the biting, shaking, and exploring also turned out to be a legitimately good arm workout! My only small suggestion would be to allow for a slightly faster movement speed or a “zoomies” toggle. Sometimes you just want to dash from room to room with that frantic puppy energy. A fantastic, heartwarming, and unexpectedly active VR title that any animal lover should try.

This game is basically "Dog's Day Out: VR Edition," but with more teeth and digging. I've spent hours just tearing up the backyard and chewing on furniture. The "everything is destructible" philosophy is brilliant. It's so much fun being a little menace without any real-world consequences. My actual dog keeps giving me side-eye for playing this. 10/10 good boy simulator!

reviews.review_title: Be a destructive dog. It's awesome. 5/5
reviews.review_description: Great game for simple fun. Cute cartoon graphics, tons of stuff to break, and you can dig everywhere. Very satisfying and stress-relieving. Highly recommend!
The physics in 'Dog Plan' are spot on. Knocking items off shelves and watching them shatter feels weighty and satisfying. It's a simple concept executed perfectly.

I did not like this game. It kinda seemed like a waste of money. There was a small house and not any other locations. I got bored really fast. The paws are clumsy. It’s just not for me. If you are a dog lover you will absolutely love this game.

developer_response.body: You can go out to the yard through the small doggy doors under the front and back gates. There are lots of fun places outside, and more NPCs to interact with.

reviews.review_description: It's fun, but it could be better. Hopefully there will be more controllable items, and I look forward to more gameplay updates

reviews.review_title: Finally, I can be the naughtest
reviews.review_description: This game is pure joy. The immersive interactions are amazing—using my virtual teeth and paws to cause delightful havoc is incredibly cathartic. Every object feels like a new toy waiting to be shredded or buried. The cartoon graphicsmake all the destruction feel lighthearted and fun. If you need to let off some steam, this is the ultimate virtual canine playground.
Destructible pillows, messy rooms, and a stressed-out owner. This is the ultimate Beagle simulator.
Hi everyone this game is not fun or funny

I just wrapped up playing Dog Plan, and I had such a fantastic time! There were a couple of glitches, but honestly, they just added to the fun. I'm super excited for the new content that's coming out!

I like the game.  Paws are a bit glitchy when it comes to walking and getting stuck under a cabinet. I do wish that there was a way to see what your next assignment is without going all the way back to the bed. Other than those Minor things it's a really cute game and can't be beat for the price.  I recommend it. ☺️

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support. We are currently working on a new version that includes optimizations for the issue of claws getting stuck, as well as new gameplay features and items. Feel free to join our Discord server for updates.

reviews.review_description: I love it but it's just a little scarier because the dog owner can go upstairs unlike granny in i am cat and he is faster and there is some glitches
I recommend this game cause it's basically i am cat but cheaper and better and your a dog. I play this game everyday so I can unlock every map.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your recognition. We will soon update and add more interesting and fun content.

reviews.review_description: Skateboarding is very fun, the percussion music is fresh, and there are many other fun things. It's my luck to be able to play this game
Vrm bien hâte pour les mise à jour

developer_response.body: We will soon update more fun content.

reviews.review_description: This game have a lot of toy to play,amazing game!
hope the dog can do more
Some physical interactions need improvement.

developer_response.body: Are you experiencing any issues in the game? Feel free to bring them up and we'll help solve them. If possible, please join our Discord group to provide feedback. Thank you.

reviews.review_description: Better I am cat! I like this game more. I like playing as a bad dog
